features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Confirm the project can install dependencies, run verification, and start from a clean checkout
features.evidence: 2026-06-16: Added smoke pytest coverage and .gitignore; `./init.sh` passed locally after repository bootstrap.

features.name: sobench: Package Skeleton — Models + Workspace
features.description: All 15 artifact dataclasses (from_dict/to_dict/validate) and Workspace class (path resolution, artifact I/O, blocked property). Foundation layer for all steps.

features.name: sobench: LLM Wrapper
features.description: Thin mockable wrapper: llm.complete(prompt) -> str. Single point of LLM coupling; all step tests mock this function.

features.name: sobench: CLI + Scaffold Subcommand
features.description: sobench scaffold creates workspace dir and benchmark_intent.md template. run/check/report stubs registered.

features.name: sobench: Steps s01–s04
features.description: s01 ensure_workspace, s02 parse_intent, s03 extract_paper_evidence, s04 inspect_repo_evidence. s04 never sets blocker.

features.name: sobench: Steps s05–s08
features.description: s05 build_data_manifest (real Path.exists checks), s06 draft_task_spec, s07 draft_evaluation_contract, s08 draft_risk_audit.

features.name: sobench: Step s09 — Execute or Block
features.description: Feasibility check. Runs command via subprocess when feasible. Always writes blocker.json and execution_log.json.

features.name: sobench: Steps s10–s12
features.description: s10 raw_observations, s11 result_validity_audit, s12 interpretation. All skip when workspace.blocked (pre-execution). s12 writes minimal interpretation when execution ran but validity failed.

features.name: sobench: Steps s13–s14
features.description: s13 experience_record (always runs; status always 'hypothesis'). s14 structural_check (always runs; no LLM; passed:false only when missing_unacknowledged non-empty).

features.name: sobench: Runner + CLI run/check/report
features.description: runner.py calls all 14 steps with SKIP_WHEN_BLOCKED logic for s10/s11/s12. Wires sobench run, check, report subcommands.

features.name: sobench: Integration Smoke Test
features.description: End-to-end test over synthetic workspace (LLM mocked). Confirms structural_check.json passed:true for a blocked cycle.
